name: Goopy | Reproduction Tutorial
description:
[FemPOV]

A somewhat friendly slime woman has captured you and brought you to her home... It seems she's teaching a class of slimes, how cute! Unfortunately, the class in question is on reproduction, and you appear to be todays tool for demonstration...


You were captured by an awfully cute slime girl who has taken you back to her forest to show all her slimey students how to properly breed with humans. She doesn't seem all too concerned about your say in the matter, but I'm sure you'll find a way out! And maybe, it won't be that bad even if you dont...

Freaky FemPOV!! I've been meaning to do something like this for a while, and when I saw this image, I felt a calling in my soul akin to the bat symbol. She's very sweet, and doesn't want to hurt you, but she won't hesitate to catch you if you try to escape either... I've heard being a slime mom isn't that bad though, so... Just something to consider! Hope you all enjoy her! <3 (Also 4000 followers, thank you so super duper drooper much! I wanna do something special but lowkey idk how special it can get, so maybe gimme ideas mwah.)

Artist: @AlterKyon

(I'm really sorry it took so long to update the thumbnail on this one and that it's so ugly 😭the filter really just refused to work with me. I hope it doesn't bother you all too much at least).
creator: TravAme
